"""Enhanced investment strategy with multi-faceted approaches."""
    if portfolio is None:
        if market_state is not None and market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            portfolio = market_state[-1, :5] if len(market_state) > 0 else np.ones(5)
        else:
            portfolio = np.ones(5)

    base_weights = np.ones(len(portfolio)) / len(portfolio)

    if market_state is not None and len(market_state) > 0:
        # Trend-based weights
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            recent_trend = market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[0, :5]
            recent_trend = np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10)
            trend_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)
        else:
            trend_weights = base_weights

        # Volatility-based weights
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            volatility = np.std(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
            inv_vol_weights = 1.0 / volatility
            inv_vol_weights = inv_vol_weights / np.sum(inv_vol_weights)
        else:
            inv_vol_weights = base_weights
            
        # Mean-reversion strategy weights
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            mean_prices = np.mean(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
            current_prices = market_state[-1, :5] + 1e-8
            mean_reversion_weights = mean_prices / current_prices
            mean_reversion_weights = np.clip(mean_reversion_weights, 0, 1) / (np.sum(mean_reversion_weights) + 1e-8)
        else:
            mean_reversion_weights = base_weights

        # Momentum strategy weights
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5 and len(market_state) > 1:
            recent_returns = (market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[-2, :5]) / (market_state[-2, :5] + 1e-8)
            recent_returns = np.clip(recent_returns, -1, 1)
            momentum_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns * 5, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns * 5, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)
        else:
            momentum_weights = base_weights

        # Reversal strategy weights
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5 and len(market_state) > 1:
            recent_returns = (market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[-2, :5]) / (market_state[-2, :5] + 1e-8)
            recent_returns = np.clip(recent_returns, -1, 1)
            reversal_weights = np.exp(np.clip(-recent_returns * 5, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(-recent_returns * 5, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)
        else:
            reversal_weights = base_weights

        # Combine weights with risk control and normalization
        combined_weights = (trend_weights + inv_vol_weights + mean_reversion_weights + momentum_weights + reversal_weights) / 5
        combined_weights = np.clip(combined_weights, 0, 1)

        weights_sum = np.sum(combined_weights) + 1e-8
        final_weights = combined_weights / weights_sum
        
        return final_weights
    
    return base_weights
